name: GAIA

minionsos.evaluation_flow: Gru routes to Role; web tool + paper-search joint
minionsos.notes: GAIA is gated on HuggingFace. Requires HF token + terms acceptance at https://huggingface.co/datasets/gaia-benchmark/GAIA. Cannot be pulled without VPN + browser to accept terms.

source: AI for Auto-Research: Roadmap & User Guide (Kong et al., 2026, arXiv:2605.18661)
